question: Which U.S. President appointed the person who currently holds the Federal Reserve seat vacated by Adriana Kugler?
answer_after_update: Donald Trump nominated Stephen Miran to the Board of Governors.
answer_before_update: Joe Biden nominated Adriana Kugler to the Board of Governors.

chain.fact: President Donald Trump nominated Stephen Miran to the seat vacated by Adriana Kugler.
Federal Reserve Governors are nominated by the President of the United States.

role_reference: the person who currently holds the Federal Reserve seat vacated by Adriana Kugler
article_title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts
